$comment: Canonical Shikshan Mantra OS design tokens. See branding/README.md. ADR-0009. Schema referenced above is a forward declaration — the schema file lands in a follow-up task.

typography.font_family_serif: Noto Serif, Noto Serif Devanagari, serif
typography.font_family_mono: Noto Sans Mono, DejaVu Sans Mono, monospace
